array.string: cd /Users/stefano/Projects/claude-rag && \ .venv/bin/python ingest_files.py --dirs /Users/stefano/Projects /Users/stefano/Documents/notes 2>> ~/.local/share/claude-rag/logs/nightly.log && \ .venv/bin/python ingest_export.py 2>> ~/.local/share/claude-rag/logs/nightly.log && \ .venv/bin/python -c " from claude_rag.core import optimize_table, table_exists for t in ['memory', 'knowledge']: if table_exists(t): optimize_table(t, cleanup_older_than_days=7) " 2>> ~/.local/share/claude-rag/logs/nightly.log
